name: ZOY Home Furnishing Co., Ltd.
summary: Zoy Home Furnishing Co.,Ltd. designs, produces, and sells furniture worldwide. It offers motion, power motion, and stationary sofas, as well as accent chairs, push back and lift recliners, and office chairs; and zaisu, thera, block, prado, X-space, puzzle, and delano products. The company was formerly known as Home Furnishing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Zoy Home Furnishing Co.,Ltd. in November 2015. Zoy Home Furnishing Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Huzhou, China.
